Notes:
Sunt asa cum am fost mereu, desi poate putin altfel. Sunt aceasi ca atunci cand m-ati cunoscut si cu toate astea sunt altfel de fiecare data cand ne intalnim. Cu unii dintre voi ma intalnesc rar, cu altii zilnic; chiar si asa sunt tot eu. Faptul ca ne vedem mai rar sau mai des nu ma face cu nimic mai putin sau mai mult "eu" decat sunt.
Timpul insa este cel care ne joaca feste marete, ne da impresia ca distanta "ucide". Poate s-o faca sau nu, asta de noi depinde. Pe mine distantele ma fac sa fiu de multe ori mai aproape, cu sufletul, cu gandul, de cei care sunt departe fizic de mine. E drept, prieteniile se dilueaza la distanta, iubirile devin goale si discutiile tot mai generale, dar chiar si asa, cand oamenii raman la fel, cand au aceleasi principii de viata si aceleasi lucruri in care cred, povestea lor poate dainui peste timp.
Sunt eu oriunde as fi, schimbata sau nu, departe sau nu, sunt aceeasi eu dintotdeauna.

Notes:
LE CONCEPT :

Actuellement une réunion mensuelle est organisée. Le but défini est de réunir des cadres de PME- PMI francophones ainsi que des managers de sociétés ou d'entreprises francophones, ayant des activités en Roumanie ou projetant d'en avoir.

LES PRINCIPAUX OBJECTIFS :

•	Rencontrer des professionnels de différents secteurs d'activités
•	Développer vos réseaux
•	Trouver de nouveaux clients et opportunités commerciales
•	Nouer des partenariats
•	Echanger et partager vos expériences
•	Se tenir informé des dernières actualités
•	Anticiper, planifier et agir rapidement

Cette rencontre est basée sur le principe de la « recommandation d'affaires ».

La plupart des PME/PMI, jeunes entreprises ont la conviction que les réseaux jouent un rôle crucial et capital dans le développement de l'entreprise.

La philosophie de notre concept est :
•	de faire partager son réseau aux membres
•	de pouvoir s'entraider dans les affaires
•	d'apporter une complémentarité
•	d'obtenir une valeur ajoutée. 

D'une certaine manière, l'objectif est que chaque membre devienne 'le commercial' de l'autre. 
Nous encourageons et facilitons les partenariats et la mise en place de synergies entre les entreprises membres. 

COMMENT « CFA »  CLUB FRANCOPHONE DES AFFAIRES
ORGANISE LES REUNIONS ? ... Le nombre de place est limité

•	Les réunions CFA on étés fixées le premier mardi de chaque mois
•	CFA publie et envoie en temps voulu le détail de la réunion avec toutes les informations
•	Les participants s'inscrivent par mail ( clubfrancophoneaffaires@gmail.com)
•	Les places étant limitées CFA confirme la présence aux participants sélectionnés et leur envoie l'invitation avec le déroulement de la réunion

Notes:
Oh dear. It seems my other post was deleted due to its inflammatory nature :(

Perhaps I shall try to make nice, yes?

I've never quite found that magical woman I've been searching for. Oh,
I have a picture in my mind, but this imagining never quite comes to
fruition. I truly don't believe that there is a 6' plus young woman
out there who could talk my ear off about punk, politics, her cat, and
the first time he played Chrono Trigger, or Final Fantasy, or the
Illusion of Gaia.

So, facebook, I have resorted to you to help me find someone I can
actually stand!

In short, I love people who are intelligent. This does not include
people who merely say they are intelligent. I make no pretenses about
who or what I am, and expect no less from any person I'm at all
interested in.

That said, you should be able to/should:

- hold a conversation about things that weren't fed to you by your
television (this includes music, books, and oh, opinions and such)
- have a sense of humour (the more abrasive and inappropriate, the better)
- have ambition and be passionate about SOMETHING

Bonus points will be awarded for:

- geeking out over SNES RPGS
- geeking out over the Replacements and the Nils and the birth of grunge
- reading books/watching films that have nothing to do with Michael Moore
- helping me out with the Saturday/Sunday crosswords when I get fed up
with them

Multipliers will be applied for:

- cuddling while watching bad Marvel Comics movie adaptations
- hardcore makeouts
- baking cupcakes
- breaking out musical instruments and playing horrible crust songs
while screaming at the tops of our lungs
- being taller than I am

As for me, I possess all of the qualities and meet the requirements
listed above (save for the height, har har). Perhaps you have a list
of your own to share?

Physcially, I'm rather tall (5'11"), and am quite far from skinny; a
fact the round shape I call my torso will attest to. My love for baked
goods far outweighs my desire to have tiny hips and no ass. I suppose
I would be referred to as geeky, meaning that people probably believe
they can tell what music I listen to and what my political stance is
just by looking at me. I have that look with the bangs and the glasses
and the clothes that everyone who has ever purchased an album with the
subheading "POST GRUNGE SCREAMOXCORE" from HMV seems to love. Oh well.
At least my hair isn't dyed black (anymore)? Haaaaaha.

If anything listed above sounds at all like you, or you wish to know
more, feel free to reply. Give me a shout even if you read through
this opus, if you like. A picture for a picture sounds like a fair
trade, yes?

Later, gents.
